title: Less Visible Leaves
description: Makes the leaves not as visible to make it easier to see in pvp situations
body:
![Less Visible Leaves Title Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76b4b99e4f52ab0f6bb8365862128b02d05e7736.png)

# IMPROVE YOUR GAMEPLAY!

Less visible leaves does as it says...it makes the leaves less visible but still visible.
**It may not be allowed to use in some servers so make sure to check with their rules before using!**

![Less visible leaves example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71807176dbedabd032c4bb2645f5d98fd0e52f3c.png)
